summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 10 listed PRs. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. Closed PRs are kept closed, security-sensitive PRs are routed to central security handling, and ready/unclear open PRs are left for maintainer or follow-up review without planning GitHub mutations.

actions.reason: Already closed in live preflight state; keep as closed historical context.
Exec approval path and symlink boundary changes are security-sensitive for this workflow.
Already closed in live preflight state; keep as closed historical context.
Distinct open PR with failed proof; keep independently tracked rather than close or merge.
Unique feature work that is not merge-ready and requires separate product review.
Substantial independent contributor PR; not eligible for merge in this plan-only, no-merge job.
Maintainer review is the remaining decision for a narrow open PR with passing proof but no merge authority in this job.
Provider/auth compatibility bug candidate without sufficient proof; keep independently tracked.
Ready-looking PR where the remaining action is maintainer review, not automated closure or merge in this job.
Security-boundary-labeled iOS/gateway voice-engine feature is out of scope for ProjectClownfish mutation.

needs_human: #90095 needs maintainer review because proof is passing in preflight but the job blocks merge and latest ClawSweeper text still says proof is needed.
#81696 needs maintainer review because proof is sufficient, mergeability is clean, and ClawSweeper explicitly requests maintainer review before merge.
